name: shop-general
summary: A general store selling tools, rope, salt, lanterns, blankets — whatever a town needs. Counter up front with a scale, shelves of mixed goods behind, a back door to storage.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle with counter at street side, shelves along walls

accent.purpose: worn path from door to counter

primary_palette.note: measured-goods shop — salt, grain, flour by the pound
curios-leaning shop — glassed cases for small valuables

story_prompts: market morning — several customers, shopkeep weighing goods, apprentice restocking
slow afternoon — shopkeep reading a ledger, dust motes in light from the door
resupply day — wagon at the back door, crates pouring in
robbery scene — counter tipped, goods scattered, shopkeep bleeding

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: practical shop light (0.45) with daylight from door

anti_patterns: shelves hug the walls — center is for customers
counter faces the door — shopkeep sees who enters
don't over-theme — a general store carries EVERYTHING, show variety
